title: calamagrostis sesquiflora subsp. urelytra
intro: Calamagrostis sesquiflora subsp. urelytra is a subspecies of a type of grass, specifically a perennial bunchgrass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis sesquiflora subsp. urelytra include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. However, I couldn't find any information on specific herbal preparations or conventional uses of this plant.
